phase_name: Filter WABA templates by connection and add phone keywords like fone to CSV parser

completed_tasks.name: Database Migration for WABA Connection Scoping
Update Device Sync Handler and Campaign Connection Scoping
Add Phone Keywords to CSV Parser

decisions.rationale: Filtered templates client-side in campaigns.templ by attaching data-connection attribute to option tags and reading it in javascript on connection change. This prevents WABA templates from crashing/overlapping on multi-connection configurations.

decisions.decision: Fallback WABA connection on campaign creation
decisions.rationale: If uuid.Parse fails for connection ID in channel form field, fall back to resolving default connection for that channel. Keeps backward compatibility and existing tests intact.

next_action: Verify dashboard campaigns view in web console with real mailing lists
context_notes: Completed successfully. All tests compile and pass.
